title: HS2 Ltd response to Residents' Commissioner's report 22
body: "In this letter, High Speed Two (HS2) Ltd Chief Executive Officer, Mark Wild, responds to the twenty-second Residents’ Commissioner’s report.  The Residents’ Commissioner’s report explains what activity has taken place since the previous report and looks in particular at HS2 property schemes and complaints process.  The Residents’ Commissioner acts as an impartial monitor, ensuring that HS2 Ltd is open and transparent in it’s communications with residents affected by HS2. "
